Welcome to Mooseport (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $14,469,428Details
International Box Office $25,342
Worldwide Box Office $14,494,770
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,775,132 (46.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.14 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:99.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$26,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,868 opening theaters/2,868 max. theaters, 2.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $27,867,051

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 20th, 2004 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: April 29th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some brief sexual comments and nudity
Running Time: 110 minutes
Geographical setting: Maine
Plot point: Political, Politicians, Satire, Underdog
Social setting: Life in a Small Town, Political Campaign
Subgenre: Satirical Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States, Germany
Languages: English
